query:
SELECT b.id, b.status, b.session_date, b.session_start_time, b.total_amount_cents, p.name, p.type
FROM bookings b
LEFT JOIN programs p ON b.programId = p.id
WHERE p.type NOT IN ('private_lesson')
ORDER BY b.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
